company.raw_notes: The homepage content provided is entirely the out-of-the-box WordPress default post and placeholder lorem ipsum text. There is no company description, no services listed, no team page, no about section, no case studies, no pricing, no industry signals — nothing substantive. The site appears to have been very recently stood up and has not yet been configured or populated with real content. The org_name 'Natan IT Solutions' suggests an IT services or solutions company, but this is only an inference from the name — it is NOT supported by any first-party content on the site. Web searches for 'Natan IT Solutions' and 'natanitsolutions.com' returned no matching results for this specific entity; all similar-sounding companies found (NAT IT Solutions at natitsolutions.com, NAT IT Solutions at natitsolution.com, Nahum Natan Technology Solutions in Israel, etc.) are distinct companies with different domains and are NOT the same organization. None of those results can be attributed to this signup.
